question_text: Before we begin — please answer a few quick questions about your SAT background.

How This Works

You are about to work through two SAT practice questions with a tutor. Before you begin, we would like to learn a little about your current preparation level.

Please keep the following in mind:

  1. Answer every question as honestly as possible — there are no right or wrong answers here.
  2. Your responses will be kept completely confidential and used only for research purposes.
  3. This questionnaire should take no more than 2 minutes to complete.

About the SAT sections covered in this session:

  • Writing & Language — grammar, usage, and sentence structure
  • Math — algebra and problem solving

When you are ready, scroll down and complete the questions below, then click Next.
